innateAbility.name: Spider's Milk
innateAbility.description: Grants a lifesteal-based heal over time buff per enemy hero killed within the radius to Broodmother and her player-controlled units.

abilities.name: Insatiable Hunger
abilities.description: Grants a base attack damage bonus and lifesteal aura to Broodmother and all Spiderlings within the radius.

abilities.name: Spin Web
abilities.description: Spins a large web that grants Arachnia a bonus movement speed and bonus health regeneration within its radius.These webs do not expire until the max amount of webs are reached, destroying the oldest spun web.

abilities.name: Incapacitating Bite
abilities.description: Applies a movement speed slow and blind debuff per successful attack.The debuff-affected units have a chance to miss their attacks.

abilities.name: Spinner's Snare
abilities.description: Creates invisible web-snares next to any current webs that acts as a trap. The snares have an activation delay.

abilities.name: Spawn Spiderlings
abilities.description: Broodmother injects her young into an enemy unit and dealing damage.Upon the affected unit's death, her babies mature, hatching young Spiderlings to aid her in the battlefield.

talents.left: +7% Spin Web Move SpeedUnlocks Max Move Speed
